Diptera Karyotype Database

3,443 records · All karyotype databases

Loading database…

–
records match filters

3,443 Diptera (true fly) karyotypes compiled from published cytogenetic studies, covering chromosome numbers, sex chromosome systems, and karyotype morphology across the order.

Submitting data: If you are aware of records that should be added, please contact us.

Data must not be reproduced in published lists or databases without permission. Provided solely for personal and academic use.

Citation: Morelli, M.W., Blackmon, H. and Hjelmen, C.E. Diptera and Drosophila Karyotype Database. Frontiers in Ecology and Evolution.
